_doc: Per-repo last-scanned commit for portfolio-refresh. After a refresh pass scans `git -C <repo> log <last>..HEAD`, it ADVANCES each entry to that repo's current HEAD. Seeded with the HEADs of the key showcased projects on 2026-06-14. Add a repo here when it earns a place on the site.

_notes./home/codex/Projects/_fredgpt-build: Not a git repo on this box (null = scan its working tree / case-study source rather than git log). FredGPT confidentiality rules apply — see AGENTS.md.
_notes./home/codex/Projects/TreAxe: Co-owned with Barrat Mohammad. Prefer TreAxe's own official screenshots from docs/features/*/images/ over re-captures.
